--- Round 1 --- The question asks: "请回答归属于母公司股东的净利润最低的公司是哪一个？" (Which company has the lowest net profit attributable to shareholders of the parent company?) I'm processing DOC1, which is a 2024 Q1 report for a company. From the anchor summaries, I can see: - DOC1_A1 mentions: "三湘印象2024年一季度营业收入为45,188,663.74元，同比下降38.59%；归属于上市公司股东的净利润为-24,229,758.80元。" - DOC1_A5 also mentions: "归属于母公司所有者的净利润为-24,229,758.80元" So DOC1 is about "三湘印象" (Sanxiang Impression) and its net profit attributable to shareholders of the parent company is -24,229,758.80 yuan. I need to open at least one anchor to get the verbatim evidence. Let me start with DOC1_A1 since it clearly mentions the company name and the net profit figure. After I extract this evidence, I'll need to compare with DOC2 and DOC3 to find which company has the lowest net profit. But for now, I'm only processing DOC1.
